generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Critical: New intelligence shows foreign actors are exploiting loopholes in domestic surveillance laws. Last year alone, 12 coordinated attacks were detected too late because of outdated tools. We can't afford to wait. Strengthening security powers isn't about civil liberties - it's about giving our agencies the tools they need to stop threats before they happen. #NationalSecurityFirst #DutyFirst
